creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
===>   Registering installation for gnuplot-4.6.3_1
Installing gnuplot-4.6.3_1...pkg-static: gnuplot-4.6.3_1 conflicts with py27-gnuplot-1.8_4 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/share/doc/gnuplot/Gnuplot/gp_mac.html
*** Error code 70

However, I cannot see gp_mac.html
mentioned in math/gnuplot/pkg-plist or
math/gnuplot/Makefile, so I'm not sure
why the error.
